programme.desc: Sixty-six million years ago, an asteroid wiped out the dinosaurs in a fiery global catastrophe. An amazing new trove of fossils reveals how mammals took over, ultimately evolving into the huge array of species -- including us -- that rule the Earth today.

programme.title: History Detectives: Mysteries From the Wild West
programme.desc: Did a biography of legendary frontiersman Kit Carson once belong to members of his family? A saddle tells the story of Yakima Canutt. What is the meaning behind the mysterious inscription on sheet music of the popular western song 'Tumbling Tumbleweeds'.

programme.title: Magical Land of Oz: Human
programme.desc: An exploration of Australia’s mesmerising wildlife and how they have adapted to survive in the human environment, including a dancing peacock spider in a suburban garden.

programme.title: Life From Above: Changing Planet
programme.desc: Take a fresh look at our fragile planet and see just how much it’s changing. Cameras in space show growing cities, disappearing forests and melting glaciers, but one country regenerated a landscape and helped save a chimpanzee family.

programme.title: Nova: Rise of the Mammals
programme.desc: Sixty-six million years ago, an asteroid wiped out the dinosaurs in a fiery global catastrophe. An amazing new trove of fossils reveals how mammals took over, ultimately evolving into the huge array of species -- including us -- that rule the Earth today.

programme.title: The Greeks: Cavemen to Kings
programme.desc: Uncover the first draft of Western civilization, which, though it met a spectacular end, laid the groundwork for the revolution in human thought that was to come.

programme.title: The Great American Read: Other Worlds
programme.desc: Take a magical journey to another world through some of America's best-loved novels. From Middle Earth to Lilliput, the trials and tribulations of these alternate universes help us to better understand our own world.

programme.title: Civilizations: Paradise on Earth
programme.desc: Explore one of humanity’s deepest artistic urges: the depiction of nature. But landscape painting is seldom a straightforward portrayal of observed nature; it's a projection of dreams, idylls, escapes and refuges—the elusive paradise on earth.

programme.title: American Experience: Chasing the Moon
programme.desc: Experience the thrilling era of the space race, from its earliest days to the 1969 moon landing. A fascinating mix of scientific innovation, political calculation, media spectacle and personal drama, the series brings the Space Age to vivid life.

programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel develop a plot to break their husbands' newly-adopted clothing habits.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Has Her Eyes Examined
programme.desc: Lucy winds up with drops in her eyes when Ricky visits an oculist.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky's Old Girlfriend
programme.desc: A fictitious old flame of Ricky's provides a nightmare for Lucy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: Blanche is exposed in the newspaper entering the home of a local married politician.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Blanche makes a move at Ted, Stan's brother, the minute she learns he's a neurosurgeon. She is furious when she discovers the only woman Ted is apparently interested in is Dorothy. Meanwhile, Rose is suffering from insomnia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven
programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch
programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: A lifestyle show featuring special guests filmed live at Universal Studios in California.

programme.title: Movie: All of My Heart
programme.desc: When a young woman inherits half of a house, she picks up her life and moves to the country for a fresh start. The man who owns the other half wants to sell it, but over time they develop a relationship.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweeter Side of Life
programme.desc: A woman is left penniless after her divorce, and though she wants nothing more than to return to her high-class life, spending time with her father in her hometown causes her to see things differently.

programme.title: Movie: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: June 8, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: June 9, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy! 2000
programme.desc: When Timmy is diagnosed with Attention Deficit Disorder, it triggers a wave of prescription drug abuse at South Park Elementary. With all the spare time he has now, Timmy joins a rock band as the lead singer.

programme.title: South Park: The Entity
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device. Meanwhile, Kyle tries to ditch his cousin, also named Kyle, who comes to South Park for an extended visit.

programme.title: South Park: Free Hat
programme.desc: When the boys find out that their favourite movies are being enhanced, re-released and ruined in the process, they form a club to 'Save Films from their Directors.'

programme.desc: Doug is the envy of his neighbourhood when Carrie surprises him with a big-screen TV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fat City
programme.desc: Doug is worried that Carrie has put on a few pounds and may wind up resembling her mother.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cello, Goodbye
programme.desc: Doug worries when Carrie's new job in a posh Manhattan law firm keeps her working late.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Richie's Song
programme.desc: Carrie refuses to double date with Richie and his obnoxious cheating wife, Marie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Paternal Affairs
programme.desc: Doug is horrified when Arthur asks permission to 'woo' his Aunt Sheila when she visits.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Head First
programme.desc: Doug realizes that befriending Arthur has some real benefits when they go out together.

programme.title: The King of Queens: The Rock
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie learn that her engagement ring is worth a fortune and decide to sell it.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Educating Doug
programme.desc: Doug is out of his league when Carrie signs them up for an English literature class.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Road Rayge
programme.desc: Doug loses his license when he is coerced into cheating on the driver's test.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Supermarket Story
programme.desc: Doug, Carrie and Arthur endure chaos when they go shopping the day before Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Noel Cowards
programme.desc: When their car breaks down, Doug and Carrie realize they will have to buy a new one.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Much to Doug's dismay, Carrie insists that his friend Spence needs a woman in his life.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Best Man
programme.desc: Doug attends a wedding after discovering that Carrie and the groom were once lovers.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dog Days
programme.desc: The neighbour's dog barks at night, keeping Doug and Carrie awake.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Crappy Birthday
programme.desc: Carrie is so depressed about turning 30 that she doesn't even want to go out.

programme.title: The King of Queens: S'ain't Valentine
programme.desc: Carrie forces her father, Arthur, to attend a seniors Valentine's Day dance.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Court Date
programme.desc: Carrie gets a ticket and Doug suggests that she go out on a date with the policeman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: White Collar
programme.desc: When the shift supervisor at work suddenly dies, Doug gets his job and Carrie is thrilled.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Sugar Daddy Death
programme.desc: A married Google executive is found dead on his luxury yacht, those close to him are left baffled when the autopsy results are released. The only clue into Forrest Hayes’ death is a sexy woman seen on the boat’s surveillance.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Killer Affair
programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Sins of Fathers
programme.desc: Father-daughter duo and lovers Elby and Terri Hars sexually abused a young girl in Columbia, S.C. and Eugene Palmer allegedly shot and killed his daughter-in-law Tammy Pannirello.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fighting for Life
programme.desc: A young father allegedly murders his parents in a haze of rage and drug addiction then abandons his child and flees to the American South.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Murder on the Mountains
programme.desc: After the bodies of a mother and her two children were discovered, her husband seemed to have vanished.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Wanna-Be Gangster
programme.desc: The police are searching for Anthony 'Tony' Burroughs, who shot a man to death and then escaped to the Philippines. William Jordan escaped from prison after being convicted, along with his friend Ted Anthony Prevatte, for the murder of James Rouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Into the Red
programme.desc: Co-captains Jake and Johnathan try to form an alliance with rival Keith Colburn. Junior risks crossing into Russian waters for golden crab and Josh bets it all on a gut feeling. Later, Wild Bill turns to his last resort and seeks work in Russia.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Mayday: Scandies Rose
programme.desc: As winter slams the fleet, the Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call while captains and crew brace for the loss of friends. The clock is ticking on the cod derby for Wild Bill and Junior, while Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard at the Russian line.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Mayday: Scandies Rose
programme.desc: The Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call as winter slams the fleet. Wild Bill and Junior race the clock during a cod derby and Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard near the Russian line.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cold War Heating Up
programme.desc: As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Sig and Mandy go dark ship in towering seas. Jake's new deckhand gets injured while Junior attempts to steam through False Pass in a nighttime blizzard.

programme.title: OWN Spotlight: Where Do We Go From Here?: Part 1
programme.desc: Oprah speaks directly with Black leaders offering insight and tangible plans to answer the questions 'What matters now?' 'What matters next?' and 'Where do we go from here'?

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Legend of Wild Bill
programme.desc: While coping with a fractured relationship with his son, Wild Bill rushes to convert his two million dollar investment into a commercial crabber before the season begins.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legend of Jake Anderson
programme.desc: Against all odds, Jake Anderson fought his way back from addiction to become a captain. Now he has just two weeks to pull off another miracle, reviving his battered boat in shipyard.

programme.title: OWN Spotlight: Where Do We Go From Here?: Part 1
programme.desc: Oprah speaks directly with Black leaders offering insight and tangible plans to answer the questions 'What matters now?' 'What matters next?' and 'Where do we go from here'?

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cold War Heating Up
programme.desc: As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Sig and Mandy go dark ship in towering seas. Jake's new deckhand gets injured while Junior attempts to steam through False Pass in a nighttime blizzard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Legend of Wild Bill
programme.desc: While coping with a fractured relationship with his son, Wild Bill rushes to convert his two million dollar investment into a commercial crabber before the season begins.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legend of the Wizard
programme.desc: Capt Keith Colburn turned his last 50 dollars into a million dollar empire. Hitching his fortunes to a World War II Naval ship, Keith grew the Wizard into one of the fiercest vessels in the fleet. But every victory has a cost, every sacrifice a reckoning.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Desert
programme.desc: The ancient city of Petra, a city carved from desert rock, has baffled experts for decades. Now, new technologies resurrect the city and reveal why the spectacular civilization was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of the Colosseum
programme.desc: New evidence uncovers the ancient mysteries behind the iconic Colosseum. Archaeologists uncover the secret lives of the gladiators and make new discoveries that help explain the rise and sudden fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Blood Pyramids
programme.desc: Giant pyramids at a strange site in Mexico are revealing the bloody secrets of a mysterious civilization that vanished 1,400 years ago. Little is known about this lost culture, but new discoveries are uncovering shocking evidence of human sacrifice.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Examine new discoveries which are revealing the deepest and darkest secrets of Stonehenge, showing how ancient magic, bizarre rituals, and brutal murder built this strange monument.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunting Vampires
programme.desc: Josh explores the history of vampirism in Romania and Bulgaria.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Incan King's Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the mysterious cloud forests of Ecuador's remote central highlands in search of the all-powerful mummy of the last Inca king, Atahualpa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches in Israel and Ethiopia for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments and possess extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Tomb of the Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates heads to an active dig site in Egypt, where he joins famous archaeologist Dr. Zahi Hawass on the cusp of an incredible discovery: the mummy of an ancient High Priest.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Megan's Story

programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: OWN Spotlight: Where Do We Go From Here?: Part 1
programme.desc: Oprah speaks directly with Black leaders offering insight and tangible plans to answer the questions 'What matters now?' 'What matters next?' and 'Where do we go from here'?

programme.title: The Zoo: Beloved Bugs
programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: OWN Spotlight: Where Do We Go From Here?: Part 1
programme.desc: Oprah speaks directly with Black leaders offering insight and tangible plans to answer the questions 'What matters now?' 'What matters next?' and 'Where do we go from here'?

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has the staff anxiously preparing for the big day, zoo director Jim Breheny steps in to help a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle and a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: The Zoo: Back to Africa
programme.desc: Zoo staff make the journey to east Africa to return to the wild thousands of toads they helped rescue from extinction. Utu, the test-pilot giraffe, tries out a new piece of equipment. And the bird department works to save the lives of millions of birds.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: The birth of a little blue penguin becomes causes a sensation at the Bronx Zoo. The veterinary team scrambles to figure out what is wrong with Snowball, a snow leopard. And the exhibits team designs an exhibit for the newly arrived blue iguana.

programme.title: The Zoo: Miracle Cub
programme.desc: The ingenuity of zoo staff is put to the test as they devise a treatment for a newborn snow leopard cub struggling to walk and a group of surprisingly adorable Rodrigues fruit bats are trained for a big move.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Bulldog Bellyache
programme.desc: Yuki the bulldog ate something she shouldn't have and it's up to Dr. Blue to find it. Dr. Lavigne and his wife learn how to do alternative home care on Suki, a rescue cat his family adopted after he performed amputation surgery on both of her front legs.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Yogi Goat
programme.desc: After treating a 'yoga' goat, Dr. Blue brings his best 'namaste' to a herd house call. Dr. Lavigne has his hands full with a trained protection dog who's not a fan of him or the cameras. A party reveals if the Blue's will be adding pink to their family.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Pardon My Frenchie
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne treats a French bulldog with a very vocal breathing problem that requires special surgery, before joining Dr. Blue on a pet pig transport. Dr. Ross has an exam with a 'pig' of his own. Gurgi the guinea pig who is coughing and sneezing.

programme.title: The Vet Life: This Little Piggy Has Mites
programme.desc: An itchy pig with a mean bite tries to take a chunk out of Dr. Blue, while Dr. Lavigne uses a unique method to fix a small dog's broken leg. Dr. Ross helps a rescue dog whose injuries may have gone untreated for too long. The docs go for gold at CyFair.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Calendar Boys
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne must decide during surgery if a giant schnauzer can keep his ear. A poodle named Jay-Z with suspicious symptoms needs Dr. Blue's help. Dr. Ross removes tumors from a rat. The vets pose with pets for a calendar to help animals in Haiti.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Lumpy Duck
programme.desc: Dr. Ross closely examines a duck with a lump in his throat. Dr. Lavigne uses x-ray film during surgery in a very unexpected way, while Dr. Blue tries to uncover a guinea pig mystery at the clinic. Dr. Lavigne's wife joins a local roller derby team.

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Dog Ate My Shorts
programme.desc: Dr. Blue must figure out what's wrong with Niko, a lethargic dog that may have eaten his mom's shorts. Dr. Lavigne operates on a husky with a torn ligament and Dr. Ross faces an emergency with his own family pet. The vets treat Cy-Fair to a crawfish boil.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Operation Dalmatian
programme.desc: Dr. Blue performs a difficult surgery on a Dalmatian being weighed down by a grapefruit-sized tumor on his head. Dr. Ross brings his family together to get a service dog for his brother Tedric, who has been suffering from seizures his whole life.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Cat vs. Robot
programme.desc: Dr. Blue quarantines a dog who may be suffering with the flu, while Dr. Ross treats a wobbly boxer whose limbs never fully formed. Dr. Lavigne thinks a robot vacuum is to blame for a stressed-out cat and performs emergency surgery to save a puppy's life.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Houston Ink
programme.desc: The doctors prepare to open a new clinic but are apprehensive about a promise they made to each other regarding the event. Dr. Ross tends to a frizzle hen's eye problem while Dr. Blue is alarmed by a bulldog's burst mammary gland.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Saving Captain Hook
programme.desc: Police rescue a turtle caught on fishing line and it's up to Dr. Ross to unhook him. Dr. Blue must wait for test results after performing dental surgery on a loveable dachshund, while Dr. Lavigne gives a stray cat first class treatment.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: The Real Housewives of Paris, Part Deux

programme.title: Counting Cars: Employee of the Year
programme.desc: Count's Kustoms has had its most successful year to date, and Danny wants to reward an employee who has done the most for the shop with a car. The problem is, he can't decide who that is, so he gets creative to pick a winner.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Change of Heart
programme.desc: Danny has a last-minute change of heart and can't let go of a classic car he promised to sell to a loyal customer. Later, Kevin and Scott try to score a bike on their own, while Danny ditches lunch for a vintage Cadillac.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Firebird Fever
programme.desc: 'Engine Whisperer' Doc has a cool '67 Firebird he's been working on. While he's a mechanical maestro under the hood, his paint skills are lacking so he enlists Ryan to make it look as mean as it will run. Danny checks out a one-of-a-kind car collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Harley and the Mystery Merc
programme.desc: Danny makes a plan to put the Count's Kustoms touch on a classic Harley Davidson that he hopes to sell for a big profit. But when the bike reaches Horny Mike the whole project is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Danny's Dream, Kevin's Nightmare
programme.desc: Danny has wanted a Plymouth Roadrunner ever since a couple of car nuts pulled him over a few years ago and bought his Sebring on the spot. He's finally found one and he's doing it up exactly as he wants to. Meanwhile, Horny Mike takes on a project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Twisted Chopper
programme.desc: Dee Snider from Twisted Sister drops by the shop to get a new ‘Sugar Bear’ front end put on his Von Dutch chopper. Danny makes a road trip to L.A. to pick up the front end, and hang with his old friend Sugar while he's there.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sweet Lambo of Mine
programme.desc: Former Guns N' Roses guitarist DJ Ashba arrives at Count's Kustoms in a 2004 Lamborghini Murcielago that he wants turned into the ultimate 'mancar,' but Danny must make sure he includes something special for DJ's wife.

programme.title: Counting Cars: '68 Killer Camaro
programme.desc: A high end client has his heart set on a tricked out '68 Camaro, so Danny sets out to find one and give it the world class Counts Kustoms treatment.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph
programme.desc: Danny and the team are commissioned to restore a 1941 Triumph motorcycle back to its World War II-era glory. Even with a $50,000 budget, the project turns into one of the biggest challenges in Count's Kustoms history.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph
programme.desc: The crew continues to piece together a WWII era Triumph motorcycle for a client hoping to have it as a tribute to his family's military roots.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Better Late Than Never
programme.desc: Shannon recruits the guys to help him finish up a gift for Danny: a bike he started building for him 10 years ago. Ryan works to keep Danny out of the shop so that Shannon can finish the bike, and winds up buying a sweet Baja Bug in the process.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Low Riding Lincoln
programme.desc: Danny and Ryan have big plans for a low riding Lincoln. Lonnie, one of the shop's long time painters, wants to give his Lincoln lowrider a new, but simple, paint job but that's not going to happen.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Killer Kellison
programme.desc: Danny and the guys take on an American street machine with the hopes of bringing it to the SEMA Convention. Plus, Shannon tries to tame a 500 horsepower Boss Hoss.

programme.desc: For this week's challenge the competitors create their signature blade by using the Hada technique. The pressure mounts as one of the smiths is pushed to his absolute breaking point.

programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveal the secrets of the Seven Wonders, the engineering marvels built by great, ancient civilizations; using the latest science, experts follow fresh evidence to long-lost treasures.

programme.desc: In 2012, hikers in Los Angeles' Hollywood Hills discover the severed head of Hervey Medellin, a retired flight clerk. The cast of suspects includes former lovers, drug cartels and a murderous porn star, in a tale of lust, greed and butchery.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Sherri Rasmussen and John Ruetten are enjoying newlywed life until one morning in 1986 when Sherri calls into work sick. That night John returns home, only to find her murdered. Years later, detectives discover her killer was too close for comfort.

programme.title: Black and Blue
programme.desc: Following multiple fatal shootings of citizens and officers, tensions between minorities and police seem to be at an all-time high. Veteran journalist Tony Harris travels the nation in search of solutions.

programme.title: The Murder of George Floyd: A Nation Responds
programme.desc: The murder of George Floyd in police custody has ignited fury and mass protests around the world. In this special presentation, ID's Tony Harris leads a frank and searching conversation with leading figures in the debate of how policing must change.

programme.title: OWN Spotlight: Where Do We Go From Here?: Part 1
programme.desc: Oprah speaks directly with Black leaders offering insight and tangible plans to answer the questions 'What matters now?' 'What matters next?' and 'Where do we go from here'?

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Party Murders
programme.desc: Their evenings begin as fun celebrations with friends but they end in murder. With disturbing evidence, terrifying theories, and demands for justice.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Party Murders
programme.desc: Their evenings begin as fun celebrations with friends but they end in murder. With disturbing evidence, terrifying theories, and demands for justice.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: What the Toddler Saw
programme.desc: When a young mother is ambushed and shot dead in the driveway of her home in Charlotte, NC, Homicide Detective Garry McFadden's best witness may be a three-year-old child her son, who gives the detective a key, but cryptic clue.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Stalker or Lover?
programme.desc: After a woman's body is discovered in a burning mobile home, Charlotte, NC detective Garry McFadden finds himself with two potential murder suspects, both with solid alibis. He discovers that the flames themselves hold the secret to the killer's identity.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Charlotte, North Carolina Homicide Detective Garry McFadden gets a reminder that appearances can be deceiving, when a hit-and-run auto accident he's called on to investigate turns out to be a twisted case of murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What the Doctor Ordered
programme.desc: A hotshot surgeon on vacation with his girlfriend divulges a dark plot to murder his ex-wife.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last One to See Them
programme.desc: An investigation of Felix Vail, the man accused of murdering his first wife, Mary Vail, in 1962; and the other women in his life, Sharon Hensely and Annette Craver, are gone without a trace. Next month, after 50 years, Felix will stand trial for murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What Happened to Abby?
programme.desc: A teen vanishes on her way home from school. Weeks later a puzzling letter from her arrives in the mail. This is the story of a desperate search for a girl hidden in plain sight, and her tale of bravery and resilience in the face of terror.

programme.title: Disappeared: A Date with Danger
programme.desc: Nancy Moyer isn't home when her kids come back from visiting their dad. Police look into her background, and find a more complicated life than anyone knows.

programme.title: Disappeared: Last Words
programme.desc: Logan Schiendelman vanishes, and authorities find his car abandoned. Multiple tips claim seeing Logan, but searches turn up nothing. With no evidence of foul play, questions surface and police are forced to examine his family's controversial past.

programme.title: Disappeared: Every Mother's Son
programme.desc: 20-year old Bear Diaz has diabetes, leaving him weak and vulnerable. When he vanishes in the night with his TV, backpack and cash, investigators must consider foul play. Then Skylar Tosic disappears, leaving people wondering if the cases are linked.

programme.title: Disappeared: Into the Night
programme.desc: After a night at home watching movies, 18-year-old Zoe Campos cannot be found by her family the next morning. As investigators pore through the teen's Facebook account, they discover she did not turn in early as her loved ones originally thought.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: 36-year old Indle King courts beautiful 18-year old Anastasia Solovieva online. She travels from her home in Kyrgyztan to Seattle to marry him, but her American dream turns into a nightmare when she realizes that Indle is not the man she thought he was.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Job of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Unemployed David Pauley applies to a Craigslist ad offering a tantalizing lifeline just as the recession hits. The job sounds perfect: a live-in caretaker for a ranch in Ohio. But just as soon as he is hired, he disappears - and he isn't the first.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: A 15-year-old girl relies on Facebook to stay in contact and keep up with the latest gossip. After accepting a few friend requests from boys she doesn't know, Nichole agrees to meet one of them and discovers the truth behind their online friendship.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Final Sale
programme.desc: 50-year-old Beverly Carter is an internet savvy real-estate agent, but when she goes to meet a prospective buyer at a remote house, she goes missing. The search for Beverly goes viral, but depends on unravelling a web of false identities and fake clues.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Kill Shot
programme.desc: The FBI is quickly running out of options to save a woman and her toddler from a kidnapper hell bent on murder. To get them out alive, an ingenious plan challenges the elite Hostage Rescue Team to lure the suspect into a sniper's crosshairs.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Hunting a Lone Wolf
programme.desc: The FBI's in a race against time once an IED is discovered along a Spokane, WA parade route. It's a hunt that will take them all across the Pacific Northwest for a lone wolf suspect before he tries to strike again.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: A look at first-hand accounts of mysterious, unknown objects in the skies from pilots and astronauts.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting oceans.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Hitler's Zombie Army
programme.desc: Truth is revealed of the Allied 'monument men' discovery in 1945 of rotting corpses of Germanic heroes. A world of magic, high priests and secret castles is exposed.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: The Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. But by the early 2000's evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.desc: Brad grew up spending summers in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. Now he's ready to find a vacation home for his family, and local broker Jason Moore is just the man to help them find it, along with some help from his wife and kids.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Enchanted in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Going Big in Galveston, Texas
programme.desc: Mike, Mariellen and their two sons have vacationed in Galveston, Texas, for years, and now they're ready to buy a beach home of their own. Broker Barbara Zimmerman is here to help them find a house with a boat lift for fisherman Mike.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Massive Mud Home
programme.desc: Summer and Jack moved away from New Jersey after getting engaged to live off the grid. They buy a plot of land in Sedro Wooley, Washington and have commissioned Sunray Kelley to design and build their dream mud home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: One-of-a-Kind Rigs
programme.desc: Roger meets Josh Pollack, owner of Rosenberg's Bagels & Delicatessen in Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Old School, New School
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets schooled by two pitmasters changing the barbecue game in Charleston, S.C. One has a pit room where whole hogs get cooked low and slow. The other makes Tex-Mex with smokes meats from a massive smoker.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swine Dining
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the Liberty Kitchen in Houston, Texas, where Chef Lance Fegen has built a monster wood-fired Argentinian grill. Roger and Lance prepare a traditional Balinese pig roast by spit-roasting it over bold mesquite coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Generations Of Smoke
programme.desc: Barbecue is in the blood at two family-run institutions where the dedication for perfecting smoked meats spans decades.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Out Of This World Bbq
programme.desc: Roger meets a pit master with a PhD who cooks Carolina-style whole hog barbecue in Louisiana. Dr. Howard Conyers is an engineer for NASA by day, but a pit master at night.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City Of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: OWN Spotlight: Where Do We Go From Here?: Part 1
programme.desc: Oprah speaks directly with Black leaders offering insight and tangible plans to answer the questions 'What matters now?' 'What matters next?' and 'Where do we go from here'?

programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Billings, Montana, to tackle a one-hour steak challenge featuring a 78-ounce rib eye and two pounds of mashed potatoes, salad and bread.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Hawaii, where he embraces the aloha spirit and takes on a whopping three-and-a-half-pound burger.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Junk Food Flip: The Jalapeno Popper Flip
programme.desc: Bobby and Nikki travel to St. Augustine, Florida to discover and taste the famous Jalapeno Popper Burger at Gas Full Service restaurant.

programme.title: Junk Food Flip: The Unidentified Flipping Object
programme.desc: If a tostada, taco and burrito had a baby it would be the U.F.O. This decadent 1500-calorie burrito is the creation of Nicholas and Robin Kimball, owners of the SoCal inspired A1A Burrito Taco Shop in St. Augustine Beach FL.

programme.title: Junk Food Flip: The Drunken Cubano Flip
programme.desc: It's a junk food journey down South to Bobby's home state of Georgia, to take on a legendary BBQ sandwich called 'the Drunken Cubano' at Southern Soul Barbeque in St. Simons Island.

programme.title: Junk Food Flip: The French Toast Frankie Flip
programme.desc: The 'French Toast Frankie' contains roughly 80% of the USDA's recommendation for daily calorie intake, 'Perfectly Franks' owner Perry Cuda couldn't be prouder of that fact.

programme.title: Junk Food Flip: The Southern Comfort Flip
programme.desc: When it comes to seafood in the South, no one does it better than Roadside Seafood in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventure brings him to Detroit for the famous Detroit-style, Sicilian square pan pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kanazawa
programme.desc: Andrew introduces Kanazawa, Japan, a modern city filled with deep traditions. From regionally fished Kano crab to sushi built using aged rice and fresh seafood, he explores tantalizing eats that are unspoiled by international tourism.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: NOLA
programme.desc: New Orleans is a vibrant, eclectic city and its cuisine has been fused with a multitude of culinary influences. Andrew Zimmern explores the classic dishes from po' boys and gumbo to oysters Rockefeller and bananas Foster.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Munich
programme.desc: As the proud capital of Bavaria and beer-drinking, Munich has built a cuisine around hearty dishes meant to stick to the bones. From schnitzel and spätzle to knöedel and cake, Andrew Zimmern reveals Munich's festival of foods.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out
programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Back to School
programme.desc: We're going back to school to learn once and for all what the ultimate nostalgic dish is. We're joining Chef Beau MacMillan in the cafeteria with his Supreme Boffa super-sub sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Totally Fried
programme.desc: Food network stars reveal the best fried foods they've eaten.

programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Greatest/ The Egg
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia try to soften the heart of Lord Hater’s new giant flying battle beast by reuniting it with its lost egg.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Nice Guy/ The Timebomb
programme.desc: Wander wants to buy a drink for Sylvia from a gas station's convenience store but his extreme politeness and need to help everybody complicates things and makes this simple errand feel like a high stakes adventure.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Lonely Planet/ The Brainstorm
programme.desc: A lonely, sentient planet named Janet takes a shine to Wander and becomes so obsessed with him that she wants to keep him all to herself… forever.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Big Job/ The Helper
programme.desc: Sylvia is recruited by a rebel commando team to help steal Lord Hater's latest secret weapon. Then, on one strange day, Wander is unable to find anybody who actually needs his help.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Wanders/ The Axe
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia go from planet to planet helping people live free and have fun.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Rager / The Good Bad Guy
programme.desc: Lord Hater tries to crash the party Wander throws for the deposed rulers in Hater's prison. Then, Lord Hater finally gets to meet his villain hero, Major Threat.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Black Cube/ The Eye on the Skullship
programme.desc: Wander convinces a down-on-his-luck villain to spend a day looking on the bright side of things instead of collecting the souls of others. Then, Andy the Watchdog interviews Lord Hater for his video blog.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Hole ... Lotta Nuthin'/ The Show Stopper
programme.desc: When Wander gets his finger stuck in a black hole, he struggles to pass the time until Sylvia returns with a suitable plug. Then, Wander and Hater team up for a concert to get Dominator's attention.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Picnic/ The Fugitives
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia are fugitives on a distant planet, but Wander keeps messing up Sylvia's escape plans to come to the aid of strangers who need help.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Bad Guy/ The Troll
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia crash on an asteroid populated by outlaws, so Sylvia convinces Wander to act like a real bad guy to fit in.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Day/ The Night
programme.desc: Sylvia awakens to find Wander asleep and imprisoned on Hater’s ship, and must fight to escape while managing a sleeping Wander.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Party Animal/ The Toddler
programme.desc: Sylvia intervenes when Emperor Awesome's partying threatens to destroy a planet.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Time Share
programme.desc: The neighbours are separating and have a time-share for sale in the Hamptons.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Art House
programme.desc: Doug's patience with Arthur's eccentricities fades after he almost gets Doug fired.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Maybe Baby
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie contemplate having a baby; Doug talks to Arthur about fatherhood.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Queasy Rider
programme.desc: Doug feels the road calling and, against Carrie's advice, buys himself a motorcycle.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Female Problems
programme.desc: Carrie feels friendless so Doug suggests she befriend a young woman down the street.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Assaulted Nuts
programme.desc: Doug accidentally staples his underwear to his body while goofing around with the guys.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Parent Trapped
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug have mixed reactions when Deacon and Kelly ask them to be godparents.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Tube Stakes
programme.desc: Doug is horrified to wake up one morning to discover his beloved big-screen TV is missing.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Doug Out
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie take Arthur to a Mets game and get arrested for catching a game ball.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Get Away
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie go away for a romantic weekend with Deacon and Kelly.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dire Straits
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's dinner with Ray and Debra goes awry when the guys watch the game.

programme.title: The King of Queens: I, Candy
programme.desc: Doug is giddy with excitement when the hot waitress at his local hangout flirts with him.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Roamin' Holiday
programme.desc: Doug invites Spence to move in for Thanksgiving weekend so he can avoid an annoying guest.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sparing Carrie
programme.desc: Doug's bowling team must either win a match or get rid of the poor bowler on the team.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Net Prophets
programme.desc: When Carrie receives her Christmas bonus, Doug wants to invest it in his IPS pension fund.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Party Favor
programme.desc: When Doug's cousin Danny pops the question, Doug volunteers to be his best man.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Block Buster
programme.desc: Doug hosts a reunion for his high school football team and is the recipient of bad news.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Frozen Pop
programme.desc: Arthur moves from his room in the basement to an upstairs bedroom and it bothers Doug.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: The Pastor's Secrets
programme.desc: Churchgoers knew something was up when pastor Matthew Winkler didn’t show up for services. After he’s found dead on his bedroom floor, twisted sex fantasies and dark family secrets start to surface.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: The Killer Truth
programme.desc: There are two sides to every story, but in a murder, one side dies with the victim. Each episode of 'The Killer Truth' tells the story of a single murder through the five people most intimately connected to the case.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.
