programme.title: Frasier: Boo!
programme.desc: A health scare forces Martin to re-evaluate his relationship with his girlfriend.

programme.title: Frasier: Coots and Ladders
programme.desc: When Frasier commits a crime, his guilt soon gets the better of him.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Fan Magazine Interview
programme.desc: The Ricardos prepare for an interview by putting on their best clothes and manners.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Oil Wells
programme.desc: Fast-talking petroleum tycoon tries to foist some phoney stock off on the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky Loses His Temper
programme.desc: Ricky tries psychology on Lucy's mania for hats.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Home Movies
programme.desc: Ricky's home movies inspire Lucy to become a professional moviemaker.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: My Brother My Father
programme.desc: Sophia's brother, Angelo, a priest, is coming to Miami for a visit and he doesn't know Dorothy and Stan are divorced. So in order to spare his feelings, Sophia convinces Dorothy and Stan to pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sick and Tired
programme.desc: Dorothy is suffering from a mysterious fatigue syndrome that her doctors cannot identify.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sick and Tired
programme.desc: Dorothy finds a specialist, a Chinese virologist, who may have the key to her illness.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Accurate Conception
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter, Rebecca, has some wonderful news. She's going to become a mother through artificial insemination. However, Blanche is less than thrilled and totally against the entire idea.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Fights Back
programme.desc: When the company that Rose's husband worked for, cuts off their pension plan, Rose must face the fact that she's going to get a new job, one that pays more.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love Under the Big Top
programme.desc: Dorothy's in a serious relationship with a lawyer and jumps to the conclusion that he's on the verge of proposing. His annoucement is shocking as he's leaving law to become a circus clown. Rose and Blanch put together a protest to save some dolphins.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Morgan Kohan talks about the Hallmark Movies Now original series 'When Hope Calls' and actor John Michael Higgins visits.

programme.title: Movie: Just My Type
programme.desc: A pop culture writer gets the opportunity of a lifetime when she is asked to interview an esteemed and reclusive author. Despite being from different worlds sparks ignite, which leaves her questioning her path in life.

programme.title: Movie: A Country Wedding
programme.desc: A country western star returns to his hometown to sell his childhood home. Upon his arrival, he meets the girl he proposed to when he was eight. Faced with old feelings, he will discover what really matters in life.

programme.title: Movie: Summer Love
programme.desc: A struggling single mom is studying to become an accountant. When her young daughter goes off to sleepaway camp, Maya accepts a summer internship at Kizzmit, a tech company, for college credit.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Wedding Presence
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie try to come up with a way out of attending their friend's wedding.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hi-Def Jam
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon will stop at nothing to watch the Super Bowl on HDTV.

programme.desc: Deacon has a paintball birthday party; Carrie tells Doug she finds Deacon attractive.

programme.desc: Doug is surprised to find his married best friend, Deacon, out with another woman.

programme.desc: Carrie and Doug ban sex for two weeks, forcing them to resolve their conflicts verbally.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inner Tube
programme.desc: Doug's guilty conscience leads to a spoof in which he appears on a number of TV shows.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Papa Pill
programme.desc: Doug takes his turn as Arthur's caretaker and finds it a challenging and difficult task.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Package Deal
programme.desc: Doug quits his job to work for a competitor and Carrie develops a tanning cream addiction.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie have different opinions about Deacon and Kelly's recent separation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Departure Time
programme.desc: When Doug goes to meet his parents at the airport, they ask him to sign their living will.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Swim Neighbors
programme.desc: Carrie plunges into a lawsuit with the neighbours who have built a swimming pool.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Killer Affair
programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Date With the Devil
programme.desc: Recently-divorced mom Ingrid Lyne dips her toes back into the dating scene and meets a man online. But her date at a baseball game would be her last. The next day investigators are shocked by a chilling crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: The Killer Truth
programme.desc: There are two sides to every story, but in a murder, one side dies with the victim. Each episode of 'The Killer Truth' tells the story of a single murder through the five people most intimately connected to the case.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of TP
programme.desc: The guys swipe food off other diners' plates at a buffet, tutor students in foreign languages they don't speak, and try to start a dance party in a public park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Show Party 3

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector

programme.desc: Caitlyn is receiving a special award at the ESPYs, but with Kris still sore over public comments Caitlyn made about their marriage, the daughters must find a way to support Caitlyn while still being sensitive to Kris's feelings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Price You Pay
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to find a new status quo with Scott while the rest of the family worries she's give in to him too easily. Khloé thinks twice about how much she does for her sisters. Kris braces for landfall as Kim and Kanye prepare to move back in.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rites of Passage
programme.desc: When Kylie graduates from high school, Kris decides to throw an extra special party. Kim's pregnancy cravings take her half way around the world. Khloé responds to a presence in her house by getting in touch with her psychic side.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Kylie's 18th birthday gives Kris a reason to meet Caitlyn for the first time. History repeats itself as Kim takes over Kris' home in preparation for baby number two. Khloé takes steps to move forward.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lions and Tigers and Texts
programme.desc: After finally choosing to move forward with her divorce, Khloé seeks solace in Mexico City at the big cat rescue foundation, Black Jaguar White Tiger. Meanwhile, Kris complicates matters by carrying on her own separate correspondence with Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Non-Bon Voyage
programme.desc: The family flies to St. Bart's to forget their troubles, but drama has a way of following them. Kourtney is distracted when she gets disturbing news about Scott and Kendall has beef with Kylie for bring her boyfriend Tyga.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Return From Paradise
programme.desc: With only a few days left in paradise, Kendall and Kylie try to sort out their differences while Kim and Khloé help Kourtney try to forget Scott and get her mojo back. When the family returns home, a visit from Scott throws them all for a loop.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Chicken Is Making My Back Hurt
programme.desc: Certain circumstances have left Ed obligated to take anger management classes, which forces him to seek inner peace since one little blow can put the Montecito's gaming license at risk. Mike tries to purchase a condo but the deal falls through.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Pharaoh 'Nuff
programme.desc: The Montecito prepares for the exhibit of a world famous mummy only to have it stolen before it gets to the hotel. When the authorities cannot deal with the crisis, Mike and Delinda are forced to handle the matter on their own.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Burning Bedouin
programme.desc: Things heat up at the Montecito as Sam's whale and his three wives hit town. When Sam discovers her long-lost love has awakened from a coma, Delinda must be the whale's casino host for the day. Meanwhile, Ed wants to replace his housekeeper.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bare Chested in the Park
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes the Montecito with the unexpected death of someone in the organization. Despite the news, Ed allows the Montecito's company picnic and games to carry on. Mike is appointed as the captain of the 'front of the house' team.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sea Shells By the Sea Shore
programme.desc: Style walks into the kitchen when Harlem's very own Marcus Samuelsson and Los Angeles' finest Michael Voltaggio arrive to conquer Mount Flay. They're counting on dim sum master Ed Harris or seafood connoisseur Jason McLeod to help get to the top.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ain't That Dandy
programme.desc: Ben Feldman and Katie Lee bring in jack-of-all-trades Jason Dady and Italian master Mike DeCamp to compete against Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Not a Speck
programme.desc: A Spanish cuisine expert and a Portuguese chef come to duke it out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sour With The Sweet
programme.desc: Barbecue fusion master Robert Cho and over-the-top Brian Malarkey are hungry for a win. Food Network's Sunny Anderson and chef Josh Capon will be serving one of them up to Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Greeking Out
programme.desc: The kitchen goes metal when Iron Chef Jose Garces and Worst Cooks in America's Anne Burrell team up to take down their good friend, Bobby Flay. They've handpicked "Tagine Queen" Aneesa Waheed and hard-hitting chef Ryan Lory to deliver the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Skirting By
programme.desc: It's an East coast battle when Rhode Island's Robert Sisca and Atlantic City's Michael Brennan duke it out in the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: The summer heat wave takes hold of the kitchen, and Chef Carla Hall tries to beat the heat with TV announcer Steve Higgins. They recruit red-hot chefs Kathy Sidell and Vinson Petrillo to light a fire under Bobby Flay and take him out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Take Him to Fresno
programme.desc: Atlanta chef Chad Clevenger and Puerto Rican-born chef Anita Cartagena are prepped and ready to battle it out in the arena. Food Network's Alex Guarnaschelli and actor Ben Rappaport referee this heavyweight fight for the chance to take on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: The Ginger Monkey Is Going Under
programme.desc: At the Ginger Monkey in Chandler, Arizona, chef-owner Jackson can't keep up with the demands of his high-volume restaurant. Jackson has a ton of experience and should be able to run a successful restaurant.

programme.title: Summer Rush: Make-or-break Week
programme.desc: Midway through summer, Junior and Jen Foy have costly staff issues and bad reviews to deal with at the Chateau on the Lake. Cate and Senior reopen Cate's Italian Garden after closing it last summer due to Cate's health.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Drop The Beat (Bobby)!
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michael Symon and actress Brooke Shields band together to take Bobby Flay down. With Italian chef and restaurateur Carla Pellegrino and Atlanta's Idris Muhammad on their side, Bobby will be singing a different tune.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Joke's on Bobby
programme.desc: Actress Emilie de Ravin and Beach Bites' Katie Lee aren't joking around as they try to take down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Super Typhoon, Part 2
programme.desc: Super Typhoon Nuri swallows the fishing grounds. With lives and livelihoods on the line, Rookie skipper Josh Harris's weaknesses are exposed, Captain Sig loses control of the Northwestern and Captain Elliott Neese steps down from the helm of the Saga.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Wasted Talent
programme.desc: With a 1.5 million dollar boat of his own and more King Crab quota than any other captain in the fleet, Elliott Neese throws it all away and bids a final farewell. With a baby on the way, Jake Anderson struggles to fill Edgar's shoes on the Northwestern.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Heavy Lies the Crown
programme.desc: On the Northwestern Jake gets a Whiplash-style captaining lesson from Sig. A long trip and a prank threaten Captain Johnathan's catch on the Time Bandit. To restore order on the Cornelia Marie Captain Josh must hit below the belt.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Zero Hour
programme.desc: King Crab season draws to a close: Casey forces Josh to fish at full throttle on the Cornelia Marie. Jake takes another turn at the wheel on the Northwestern. Wild Bill turns up the heat on the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hell's Bells
programme.desc: Christmas at sea for the Time Bandit is disturbed when an unhinged deckhand terrorizes the crew. Jake Anderson awaits the birth of his baby, when an unexpected phone call throws a wrench in the plan. A greenhorn's season is cut short by a gruesome injury.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Lunatic Fringe
programme.desc: Three boats hit the Opie grounds early. Johnathan Hillstrand struggles with a rogue deckhand, freshman skipper Jake Anderson prepares for the birth of his baby, and a hydraulic explosion on the Cape Caution calls Zack Larson's dedication into question.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: New Captain on the Block
programme.desc: The rest of the fleet arrives in Dutch Harbor to take opilio season by storm. Jake Anderson prepares to captain the Saga for the first time. Captain Andy Hillstrand returns to find the Time Bandit in disarray. Keith Colburn's new greenhorn turns heads.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Super Typhoon, Part 1
programme.desc: With the 800-mile super-typhoon Nuri closing in, the captains make hard choices to save their seasons. The Northwestern charges into the storm, the Cape Caution retreats to land, and the Wizard gets a replacement deckhand delivered on the high seas.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Super Typhoon, Part 2
programme.desc: Super Typhoon Nuri swallows the fishing grounds. With lives and livelihoods on the line, Rookie skipper Josh Harris's weaknesses are exposed, Captain Sig loses control of the Northwestern and Captain Elliott Neese steps down from the helm of the Saga.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Whale Sharks of the Wild West
programme.desc: Dive with Steve on the ancient wreck of the Batavia and explore the habitat of pythons.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: They Shoot Crocodiles Don't They
programme.desc: Steve turns the camera around to introduce the photographers who film his adventures.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: With winter fast approaching, the Last Alaskans set out to hunt moose. Heimo and Edna team up together. Tyler draws on gut instinct to stalk an elusive bull. And Charlie soon discovers why the area is called 'Starvation Country.'

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Spirit of the Hunter
programme.desc: With winter just weeks away, The Last Alaskans are desperate to fill their smokehouses. The Selden's all pitch in to haul home Tyler's recent moose kill. Heimo and Charlie both worry they might not have meat for the winter months ahead.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Pray for Snow
programme.desc: Winter in the Arctic Refuge usually means go time for The Last Alaskans but this year low snowfall is slowing them down - snow machines and dogsleds are useless in these trail conditions.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Race Against the Sun
programme.desc: As winter tightens its grip, the days grow shorter for The Last Alaskans and that means less daylight for checking traps. Heimo and Edna's fur count is way down and when wolves invade their traplines, Edna takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Heart of the Wild
programme.desc: Winter loosens its grip on the frozen north and The Last Alaskans celebrate sun's reappearance on the horizon. Edna gets the best birthday present she's ever received and the Selden's hear something that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes on Africa's wild Zambezi River to unmask an invisible predator that's dragging fisherman to their deaths.

programme.title: River Monsters: American Killers
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade normally travels into the most remote regions searching for freshwater monsters, but recently he's been getting reports of killers from an unexpected location, America.

programme.title: River Monsters: Rift Valley Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Africa's Rift Valley to explore the roots of fishing and the monsters the first fishermen faced; it's a dangerous place filled with killer crocs, hippos and warring gangs, but at its heart is a worthy prize: the Nile perch.

programme.title: Movie: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Aaron's father's funeral turns into chaos when his extended family arrives. An uncle complains about his daughter's boyfriend, a cousin inadvertently gives her fiancé LSD, and family secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Movie: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: After she escapes from her abusive husband, a woman takes on a new identity and begins a new life. Just as she's starting to trust and love again, though, her husband tracks her down and the nightmare that she'd escape begins all over again.

programme.title: Movie: We Belong Together
programme.desc: An obessed woman goes to terrifying lengths to keep a man from re-uniting with his former wife.

programme.title: Martin: I'm Not Your Superwoman
programme.desc: When Martin is sick with the flu, Gina stays home to take care of him.

programme.title: Martin: Woman With a Past
programme.desc: After he finds out that a recent radio guest once dated Gina, Martin becomes jealous.

programme.title: Martin: The Parents Are Coming
programme.desc: Gina wants Martin to meet her conservative parents, but Martin feels uneasy. Wanting to make a good first impression, he takes advice from Tommy and Cole.

programme.title: Martin: Three Men and a Mouse
programme.desc: When Gina is at Martin's house sleeping, she hears noises in the middle of the night. Thinking it's a robber, she begs Martin to check it out. Martin discovers that it's a mouse.

programme.title: Martin: The Great Payne Robbery
programme.desc: When Martin's neighbor is robbed, Martin holds a neighborhood crime watch meeting.

programme.title: Martin: Baby It's Cole'd Here
programme.desc: Cole's mother interrupts his evening with his girlfriend and demands back rent from him.

programme.title: Martin: Radio Days
programme.desc: Stan decides to hire a new female co-host for Martin's show to boost the ratings. At first Martin feels threatened by the move, and is very stand-offish.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Stop Will! In the Name of Love

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: You'd Better Shop Around
programme.desc: Will withdraws from his university classes to become a successful car salesman.

programme.title: The Parkers: Jury Duty
programme.desc: Prof. Oglevee is thrilled with jury duty, until he realizes he'll be serving with Nikki.

programme.title: The Parkers: An Ivy League of Her Own
programme.desc: Kim's boyfriend has a job opportunity at Harvard; Prof. Oglevee comes into some money.

programme.title: The Parkers: Til Death Do Us Part, And Make It Soon
programme.desc: Nikki tries to save Prof. Oglevee from Paris and copes with Kim leaving for Harvard.

programme.title: The Parkers: Squatter's Rights
programme.desc: Nikki is thrilled when Professor Oglevee must move in with her after he goes broke.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Ol' Ball and Chain
programme.desc: On the day of Jazz's wedding, his bride-to-be makes sexual advances towards Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Will is stranded in a mountain forest with his new girlfriend's disagreeable father.

programme.title: Martin: Blackboard Jungle Fever
programme.desc: When Martin returns to his elementary school for Career Day, he discovers his favourite third grade teacher, Ms. Trinidad, is still teaching there. As they catch up, she makes a pass at Martin while Gina watches.

programme.title: Martin: The Night He Came Home
programme.desc: On Halloween, Martin and his friends gather at his apartment to share ghost stories.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret
programme.desc: Pam, Tommy and Cole are angry at Martin and Gina when Martin reveals Pam's secret on his show. Martin and Gina's only friends left are Martin's boss Stan and Stan's girlfriend.

programme.title: Martin: Do the Fight Thing
programme.desc: Martin's radio fans love it when Gina and Martin have arguments on the show and Stan wants to permanently hire Gina as Martin's co- host.

programme.title: Martin: I Saw Gina Kissing Santa Claus
programme.desc: Martin reluctantly agrees to dress up as Santa Claus for Tommy's 'Big Brother' program.

programme.title: The Parkers: A Plot With a View
programme.desc: Nikki buys a burial plot for herself and Professor Oglevee from a shady undertaker.

programme.title: The Parkers: Mama, I'm Baaack
programme.desc: Kim surprises everyone when she returns home from Harvard but Nikki has rented her room.

programme.title: Black-ish: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: Dre, determined to make up for the no-frills, last-minute wedding he and Bow had, organizes an amazing vow renewal for their 15th anniversary, but when Bow's hippie-dippy parents show up unannounced, bombshells are dropped and old disagreements re-ignite.

programme.title: Black-ish: 30 Something
programme.desc: Dre hurts himself playing basketball right before his 40th birthday. He hands the planning over to his much younger assistant fearing he really is getting too old to be cool. Bow and Ruby face off over who gets Dre the best gift.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sex, Lies and Vasectomies
programme.desc: Bow learns from her colleague that Dre never had the vasectomy a few years back that was supposedly scheduled, so she decides to see if he’ll come clean and tell the truth.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Real World
programme.desc: When Bow reconnects with her college friends on Facebook, she invites them over for an elaborate dinner party and tries to impress them. On the night of the party, Dre ends up learning a lot of new information about Bow's past.

programme.title: Black-ish: Switch Hitting
programme.desc: When super cool and white exec Jay Sloane challenges Dre over his street cred and picks inept Charlie for a big urban market account, Dre finds himself questioning his 'blackness.' Pops gets a letter from the IRS and fears the worst.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Peer-ent Trap
programme.desc: Teenager Zoey goes through a mini-rebellion phase by pushing boundaries and acting out. Dre wants to lay down the law while Bow insists on a softer approach like her mom did with her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Please Don't Ask, Please Don't Tell
programme.desc: Dre's sister, Rhonda, is in town for Mother's Day. Although she hasn't come out to the family, everyone knows she's gay except Ruby and Bow thinks Dre should tell her the truth.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Liberals Dre and Bow go ballistic when Junior declares he's joined the Young Republican Club to impress a girl (ironically named Hillary). Meanwhile, everyone teases Zoey when she finds out she needs glasses.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pops' Pops' Pops
programme.desc: Jack and Diane look for clues about their roots for their class assignment, a history of the Johnson family. When they can't find anything out about the family's past, Pops comes to the rescue with the colourful story.

programme.desc: Jack performs the song 'Gold Digger' at a school talent show and when he sings a lyric that includes THE word, it leads to his possible expulsion from school.

programme.desc: Harry learns that a murderer has escaped Azkaban prison and is believed to be after him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fever

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Felonious Monk
programme.desc: Grissom investigates the murders of four monks who were shot while chanting in a Buddhist temple. Catherine reopens a cold case in which her best friend was murdered, after the man convicted of the crime claims he's innocent shortly before he dies.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chasing the Bus
programme.desc: A bus carrying 23 passengers from Los Angeles to Las Vegas crashes less than 40 miles from its destination, killing nine people. Before he dies, the driver recalls that, moments before the wreck, the steering wheel began vibrating like a jackhammer.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Stalker
programme.desc: Nick feels a strange connection to the murder of a woman who was killed in her home.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Got Murder?
programme.desc: A missing woman is found buried at a landfill site; a car salesman is mistaken for dead.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry learns that a murderer has escaped Azkaban prison and is believed to be after him.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Laundry Overload
programme.desc: With two children and a third on the way, life for Breanne and Justin is fun but hectic. Justin is already overwhelmed with the daily struggles of living in a small house, including limited laundry space and bathroom availability.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Couple Is Torn Between Fixing Up Their Home in the City or Moving to the Country for More Land
programme.desc: Thomas and Sarah purchased their home near the city in a neighbourhood close to where Thomas grew up. Thomas loves the location, but Sarah feels the cramped quarters confine her. She wants an open concept, but it must be in the country.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Dawayne and Joi purchased their home with a dream office that was a perfect place for Dawayne to run his business. Now Joi, Dawayne, their two kids and his mother share the space while coping with daily visits from his siblings, who live very close.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Frantic Fiasco
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina head to Placentia, California, to check out a lead on a mid-century property. The home is dated but the size and layout is a designer's dream, and most importantly, the numbers indicate it could be a profitable deal.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Broken Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house with a weird vibe in Anaheim, CA. From the start, they can't tell if someone is squatting in the house or if the neighborhood hoodlums are pranking them.

programme.title: Design At Your Door: Family Matters
programme.desc: David Bromstad brings his signature, playful style to an Austin, Texas family who's had a rollercoaster few years. Plus, Grace Mitchell brings her vibe to Santa Clarita family who want a living space where everyone can feel at home.

programme.title: Design At Your Door: Sweet Retreats
programme.desc: Tamara Day helps a San Diego nurse and her young family with her distinct style. Then, Orlando Soria helps a Dallas couple get playful by transforming their chaotic playroom into a cool space for creativity.

programme.title: House Hunters: Comics Watch House Hunters: The New Retro in Austin

programme.desc: A family who are repeat movers looks for another house in Lake Norman, North Carolina. He's willing to go with a smaller, fixer-upper to get a prime location on the lake, while she wants something that's grand and move-in ready.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Newlywed Games in Geneva
programme.desc: A couple faces big changes when they decide to get married and follow a dream job offer to Geneva, Switzerland. While he's in between jobs, he wants to live close to town to stay connected, but she prefers the suburbs to escape the city noise.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Dirty, Dated and Undesired
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a home listing online that's set for an auction that afternoon and, based on neighbourhood comps, the dirty and dated house looks like a bargain. By outward appearances, all it needs is an inexpensive cosmetic rehab.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flipper vs. Flipper
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a short sale listing in an upscale neighborhood.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Barnyard Dance
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a short sale home in a desirable neighbourhood. Based on comparable homes and what they see on the outside, it seems to be a good buy. Once they tour the home, it becomes immediately clear just how much work and money is needed.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Hard Money Blues
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a listing in an upscale neighbourhood of Whittier, Calif., and although the entire home will need some serious updating from its original 1969 finishes, the renovation appears to be mostly cosmetic.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Trade Secrets: 90 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Watch as Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt help soon-to-be newlyweds navigate their first big joint decision in 90 days or less.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Coastal Cottage
programme.desc: Brian and Mika work to keep the stress level low when Virginia empty nesters decide to build a house in Florida. She wants colour everywhere while he's imagining a white oasis, leaving Mika to find a compromise to create a home they can both love.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Home Before Baby
programme.desc: Brian and Mika feel the pressure as they build a custom dream home for an expecting couple whose baby arrives in just over 100 days.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Jungle to Dream Oasis
programme.desc: Brian and Mika are challenged to turn an overgrown lot into a dream home for an expecting family. The homeowner is also a chef who has stipulations about his kitchen, meaning Brian and Mika have their work cut out for them to create the perfect property.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A young family of five looks to put down roots in Florida by building their forever home on a 2-acre lot. Brian and Mika mix modern touches with rustic, farmhouse charm to create a dream home the family can enjoy for years to come.

programme.desc: A couple that moved from Hawaii to take care of a family member in Texas wants to recreate their outdoor lanai lifestyle. Justin McGuire and Steve Terry must use everything they have to turn their rocky Austin hilltop into a tropical paradise.

programme.desc: Vic and Yukari had to leave their beloved pool behind when they moved into a California community. Brian and Paul must create an epic pool in the couple's new, small space, and the design includes an exposed acrylic wall holding back water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Million Dollar View Pool
programme.desc: The King family seeks help building their new palace in the sunny hills of California. The Pool Kings find themselves between a rock ledge and hard design while bringing this build to life on a sloped property.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean Lines and Clean Water
programme.desc: A family's three daughters can't get enough of swimming, but their mom's chlorine sensitivity prevents her from joining in on the fun at the community pool. A special ozone system is installed that will allow her to swim.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: I Want That!: Builders, Kitchen and Bath Show
programme.desc: Be the first in the know about the latest high-tech gadgets and design trends.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: An Underground Renovation
programme.desc: A couple braces themselves for the harsh realities that come with buying a fixer upper while searching for their first home in Denver.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: West Hills, CA, newlyweds are eager to buy their first home together. He's a second-generation real estate agent so they feel confident they have the skills to lock in the perfect house.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: Beach Budget Blowout
programme.desc: A Manhattan Beach, California, family of five hopes to stay close to the beach while finding more space. Affordable homes in their dream location all require renovation.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: You've Got Ale
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Wisconsin State Fair, where a local brewery is serving the ultimate deep-fried combo of beer, brats and cheese curds.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Super Spicy
programme.desc: Grab a glass of milk and get ready to experience fiery meals from around the country. Ted Allen, Marcela Valladolid, Michael Symon and more are sharing their favorite burning hot dishes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian
programme.desc: Celebrity chefs and Cooking Channel personalities are talking about the most sensational Italian food they've ever had. Alton Brown revisits a decadent, old-world pasta dish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival Of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies On The Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Grillin' It
programme.desc: Since humans first discovered cooking with fire, they've been perfecting the art of the grill. Eddie Jackson chases after the smoky undertones and sweet, bitter char that only flame-grilling creates.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out
programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.desc: The comedic adventures of a duelling cat and mouse that sustain a classic love/ hate relationship.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Animal Cleans Up/ Best Pals Pizza Parlor Palace
programme.desc: After smelling Animal's stinky feet, the gang opens a car wash to help him clean them. Fozzie and Kermit can't agree on how to run the Best Pals Pizza Parlor Palace.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Vampirina: The Great Esmeralda / Frog's Breath
programme.desc: Vee sets out to make sure a reading from The Great Esmeralda doesn't come true; Vee turns herself into a frog.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: Mystery at the Marketplace / Mystery in the Sand Dunes
programme.desc: When Meena wants to make special ladoos for her father's homecoming party, Mira must help track down the spice merchant who has an essential ingredient. Then, while testing Neel's new vehicle in the desert, a sandstorm causes it to become lost.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Captain Rolly/ The Coolest Dogs in Town
programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Night of the Cat/ Catboy Does it Again
programme.desc: Catboy hears of a way to increase his cat power, and enlists Gekko and Owlette to help. Catboy falls prey to a Romeo remote that rewinds all action, making the night last forever.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Pondweed/ Owlette Comes Clean
programme.desc: Gekko's powers increase by power pondweed during an underwater mission. While trying to stop Luna Girl, Owlette breaks an observatory's telescope lens and blames her nemesis.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Abra-ka-Goof!/ Happy Birthday Helpers!
programme.desc: Goofy thinks he's used his magician skills to turn Gordon Gear into a rabbit. Later, the Happy Helpers go on a wild ride as they chase down a wagon carrying a birthday cake.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Pop Star Helpers/ The Chip 'N Dale 500
programme.desc: The Happy Helpers are hired to get pop star Nina Glitter to her show on time. Chip and Dale shrink everyone down to their size.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moonstruck: Race to the Moon/ Moonstruck: Luna Fortress
programme.desc: The PJ Masks must travel to the moon to keep Luna Girl from improving her Luna Magnet powers.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Gekko Everywhere / Gekko Takes Charge
programme.desc: Gekko finds a crystal that gives him powers, but it turns out the powers are too strong! While Gekko tries to stop the Ninjalinos on his own, Night Ninja tries to take over HQ!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday

programme.desc: Mickey and his friends put on a fun carnival.

programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.desc: Mickey accidentally turns his roadster into a monster truck! Daisy and Cuckoo Loca worry that Minnie is moving out!

programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: Mystery at the Marketplace / Mystery in the Sand Dunes

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Seat at the Theatre/ Bye Bye Butterfly
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a butterfly get home to its family in Mexico. The pugs push Bob's office chair to a theater to see his favorite play.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night at the Nursery/ Seas the Day
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Caution: Kids at Work! / The Snoozy Doozy Pet and Breakfast!
programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Villian of the Sky/Protector of the Sky
programme.desc: The PJ Masks discover Romeo's Sky Factory and send PJ Robot as a mole. When the Sky Factory creates a pollution cloud over the city, the PJ Masks have a hard time blowing it away!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Beaker 2.0/When You Wish Upon a Rizzo
programme.desc: Bunsen creates a Beaker 2.0; The Muppet Babies are visited by Rizzo the Genie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dadlantis/ Chloe Rules!

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Knitwits/ Dimmsdale's Got Talent?
programme.desc: Dad takes Mom on what he thinks is a knight-themed cruise to renew their vows, but it's really a knitting cruise. Mr. Bickels hosts a talent show and everyone gets in, but Timmy.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Plain Faces
programme.desc: Dylan doesn't want to attend school, and does whatever it takes to avoid going, including convincing little Charlie not to go, either.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Certifiable Super Sitter

programme.title: The Loud House: Senior Moment

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to live a life of extreme danger. SpongeBob and Patrick become obsessed with tanning.

programme.desc: A bank employee receives a coded message from an unknown person. After she deciphers the code, she finds herself involved in an espionage ring and trying to save the life of the man who sent her the message.

programme.title: One Night Stand: Flight of the Conchords
programme.desc: Cult folk parody duo Flight of the Conchords entertain a live audience with hilarious songs, witty banter, infectious tunes and their own unique brand of New Zealand humour.

programme.title: Movie: Pulling Strings
programme.desc: A U.S. diplomat working in Mexico City is saved after a night of drinking by a local Mariachi singer whose visa she rejected the day before.

programme.title: Movie: Imaginary Heroes
programme.desc: A promising young athlete's suicide wreaks havoc on an already crumbling family dynamic.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Movie: A Fish Called Wanda
programme.desc: In London, four very different people team up to commit armed robbery, then try to double-cross each other for the loot. Wanda grows closer to an English lawyer in an attempt to locate the stolen diamonds.

programme.title: Movie: LOL
programme.desc: A mom strives to reconnect with her teen daughter after reading her racy journal.

programme.title: Movie: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Repressed risk analyst Reuben Feffer keeps his life planned out perfectly until his new bride leaves him on their honeymoon. When a free-spirited former classmate comes back into his life, he re-evaluates his overly ordered universe.

programme.title: Movie: Yesterday
programme.desc: A man realizes he is the last person on Earth who remembers the Beatles.

programme.title: Movie: An Ideal Husband
programme.desc: A husband's seemingly perfect life is threatened by evidence of a past misdeed.

programme.title: Movie: Black Knight
programme.desc: An amusement park employee suffers a blow to the head and awakens in the 14th century.

programme.title: 1969: The Season
programme.desc: From the highs of winning a national championship, to the extreme lows of losing a beloved teammate, 1969 follows the Texas Longhorns on their path to their second national championship.

programme.title: Texas 4000
programme.desc: 70 University of Texas students embark on a 4,500-mile bicycle ride from Austin, Texas to Anchorage, Alaska. Their mission is to raise funds and spread hope for the cancer fighting community.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XIII
programme.desc: Jordan and Jerry Windle share a bond and Mo Bamba was shaped by the courts of Harlem. Plus, look at Connor Williams's experience at the NFL draft.

programme.title: Point Texas: 2012 Volleyball National Champions
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the Horns' dominating run through the 2012 NCAA Volleyball Tournament.

programme.title: McGarr Symposium on Sports and Society: Head Trauma and the Future of Football
